name: artcade-v2
description: ArtCade V2: Dual-runtime 2D game engine (C++ native + WebAssembly)

scripts.clean: if exist runtime-cpp\build-native rmdir /s /q runtime-cpp\build-native & if exist runtime-cpp\build-wasm rmdir /s /q runtime-cpp\build-wasm & if exist runtime-cpp\build-msvc rmdir /s /q runtime-cpp\build-msvc & if exist runtime-cpp\build-nmake rmdir /s /q runtime-cpp\build-nmake & if exist runtime-cpp\build rmdir /s /q runtime-cpp\build & if exist build rmdir /s /q build & if exist build-nmake rmdir /s /q build-nmake & if exist editor\dist rmdir /s /q editor\dist
